titleStmt.title: SII 38.177: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 177. (A.R. No. 177 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the nineteenth slab built into the floor of the verandah, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Records a gift of 30 kaḻañju of gold by Narasiṅgaiyyaṉ, son of La[kshma]ṇaiyyaṉ, a merchant in the camp of (kaṭaka) of Vallavaraiyar (Rāshṭrakūṭa) for burning a perpetual lamp to Mahādēva of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr. The ūrār of Chēṟṟuppaṭṭu in Tuḍarmuṇiyūrnāḍu (a division of) Puliyūr-kōṭṭam, received the gift and agreed to remit interest, 2(1/4) kaḻañju, every six months at the rate of 3 mañjāḍi per kaḻañju at Tiruvoṟṟiyūrāṇi with effect from the month of Āḍi in the year quoted. The ūrār also agreed to provide two meals per day to those persons (who came from the temple) to collect the interest. The ūrār also agreed to pay a fine of 8(1/2) kāṇam per day if there was any default on their part in this regard.

The Sanskrit portion of the record informs that the donor was a native of Māṉyakhēṭa (the capital of Rāshṭrakūṭas). He was a vaiśya and donated 30 nishkas, for burning a lamp at the temple of Śiva who is described as the enemy of Kāma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . bibhrāṇe caturānane
maṭhapatau dharmmāyandhuram lākṣaṇimpsa
śrī mānnarasiṁha Ādhinagare kāmadvi
ṣe dattavān trimśanniṣkasuvarṇṇa māravi sa
dā dipasya dīptyai mudā vaiśyā vallabha bhūmi pā
la mahito yo mānyakheṭotbhavaḥ . kacciyu
patineṭṭāvatu vallavaraiyarkaṭakattu viyāpāri lakṣma
ṇaiyyaṉ makan naraciṅkaiyyaṉ tiruvoṟṟiyūrma
hādevarkku Ācantrakālamum moru nann is engraved like ndatā viḷakkeri
ppataṟku vaitta ponnūṟkkaṟ cemmai muppatiṉ kaḻañ
cu Ippoṉ muppatiṉ kaḻaiñcuṅ koṇṭu kaṭavom puli
yūr koṭṭattut tuṭarmuṇiyūrnāṭṭuc ceṟṟuppeṭṭurom
Ippoṉṉāliv vāṭṭai Āṭi mutalāka kaḻaiñciṉvāy Āṇ
ṭu varai muṉṟu mañcāṭippoṉ palicaiyāka Āṟā
ṟu tiṅkaḷ nāḷilliru kaḻaiñce kāṟceytupoṉ
Ācantirakālamun nilaippoliyūṭṭaākat tiruvoṟṟiyū
rāṇi kiḻke koṇṭu cenṟiṭṭuk kuṭuppomānom Ippo
ṉ kaṭaik kūṭṭa vantārkku mek kaṇṭu coṟu kuṭuppomāno
m mitiṟ niṟampiluṇṭikaiyum paṭṭikaiyuṅ kāṭṭāte dha
rmmāsanattu nicatam Eṭṭarai kāṇantaṇṭamiṭa voṭṭikku
ṭuttom Iṭṭa kāṇañceṉṟu ṉiṉṟu puḷḷi kuttu vi
kkappeṟātomānom Ittaṇṭappaṭṭup Ippo
liyūṭṭu muṭṭāmai Iṭuvomānom ceṟṟuppeṭṭurom .
Digital edition of SII 38.177 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
